name: Dakar, Senegal
ordinary_life_texture: Supervisors drop consolidated clearance instructions directly on clerks' blotters with a noon sailing deadline.
The port uses Form C-7B for perishable cargo clearances.
Bonded transit documentation is required for non-perishable cargo moving through Senegal to landlocked Mali.
A new ECOWAS clause requires pre-inspection by an approved auditor for dual-use materials.
Industrial-grade lithium batteries used in forklifts also appear in drone power systems and trigger dual-use holds.
Auditors' deputies can review flagged dual-use holds remotely and lift them within minutes.
